rag_rules: Fix AGREE diagnostics by resolving named thing type errors through visible identifiers or helper declarations in the same annex
When AGREE reports 'named thing must be an expression with a type', trace and correct the first unresolved identifier on the same line
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics indicating type errors should be resolved by ensuring all identifiers are properly declared and visible in the current scope
AGREE contracts must reference only visible symbols or locally declared helpers to avoid type resolution failures
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must contain only valid expressions with known types; avoid referencing undefined or inaccessible symbols
Component implementation annexes are appropriate for bindings and assignments that are valid in that scope
anti_patterns: Adding new architecture elements to resolve type errors; instead, fix root causes in existing visible scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
Component type annexes vs implementation annexes for assumptions and guarantees
